prompt: Identify the component or condition shown, and name the visible defect cues.
scenario: You are on a heavy-industrial construction or process site where work follows engineered drawings, specifications, and permits. The work under review is Panelboard installation & makeup, part of the Electrical scope. The observed field condition is: missing knockout filler. The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: NEC Art. 408, 110.26 (working clearance), 200.4.
title: Identification: Panelboard installation & makeup (industrial site)
